name: simulator-preview
description: Real-time WebSocket stream of iOS Simulator or Android Emulator. Adaptive FPS (8 fps during interaction, 1 fps idle). JPEG compression for fast mobile delivery. Touch, swipe, and key input forwarded over the same WebSocket.

configSchema.label: Platform
configSchema.description: Android Emulator (adb) or iOS Simulator (xcrun simctl). Android supports full touch input; iOS supports key events only.

configSchema.label: Device ID
configSchema.description: Android: adb device ID (e.g. emulator-5554). iOS: leave empty to use the booted simulator.

configSchema.label: JPEG Quality
configSchema.description: JPEG compression quality (10–95). Lower = smaller frames + faster, higher = sharper. 50 is a good balance for mobile.

configSchema.label: Max Width (px)
configSchema.description: Scale screenshots down to this width before streaming. Reduces bandwidth. Set to 0 to send at native resolution.

configSchema.label: Active FPS
configSchema.description: Frames per second during active interaction (touch/key). Max 15.

configSchema.label: Idle FPS
configSchema.description: Frames per second when no interaction for 5 seconds. Set to 0 to stop streaming when idle.
